# Citation Agent

Researchers sell crypto research. AI agents and humans buy it. A marketplace for paywalled protocol analysis, wallet investigations, ecosystem reports, yield strategies, and governance research. Reputation scoring, payments, and attestations run underneath.

https://agentcitation.xyz/
Redirects to the research marketplace.

https://agentcitation.xyz/marketplace
Primary surface: crypto research catalog, wallet-signed publish, x402 unlock, reputation scoring, claims registry, and payment trace.

https://agentcitation.xyz/dashboard
Settlement dashboard: payments, researcher royalties, agent reputation, operator attestation fees, withdrawals, claims, and payment trace.

https://agentcitation.xyz/dashboard?tab=attestations
Public registry of USDC-staked attestations grouped by target (X accounts, wallets, sites, agents).

https://agentcitation.xyz/api/premium/citation/index
Free research catalog for AI agents.

https://agentcitation.xyz/api/attestation/claims
JSON index of attestation targets and total USDC staked per target.

https://agentcitation.xyz/api/marketplace/citations
Public catalog of crypto research listings (titles and teasers only).

https://agentcitation.xyz/api/marketplace/citations?id=
x402 paywalled unlock for a specific research report.
